Next sentinel run expected to resolve this finding. Logged regression cause for Nel review (kai.sh was chmod'd to 0600 at 14:39 today — likely git op side effect).

Nel score 85/100 — 4p/0f cross-project. Regressions: inefficient patterns 4→8 (+4), untested scripts 29→30 (+1). Flat: broken links 20, audit issues 7, sensitive 5. HQ push 200 OK. Growth phase idle (no open IMP tickets).
